title: Digital Currency - Bank of Canada
content:
## Subscribe to Digital Currency Digital Currency
- Badr Omrane Badr is Assistant Director, Financial Technology Research in the Information Technology Services Department. Department(s) : Information Technology Services Research Field(s) : Business Models , Digital Currency , Fintech
- Youming Liu Department(s) : Markets and Banking Department Research Field(s) : Applied Microeconomics , Chinese Economy , Digital Currency , Digital Economy , Environmental Economics , Industrial Organization , Payments Economics , Two-Sided Markets
- Yuteng Cheng Department(s) : Payments and Regulatory Oversight Research Field(s) : Asset Pricing , Banking , Corporate Finance , Digital Currency , Digital Economy , Fintech , Payments Economics
- Vladimir Skavysh Vladimir Skavysh is the founding leader of the Bank of Canada’s Quantum Lab for Advanced Analytics and a Senior Data Scientist in its Data Science Division. Department(s) : Corporate Services , Data Science Research Field(s) : Agent-Based Modelling , Applied Econometrics , Applied Microeconomics , Asset Pricing , Banking , Business Models , Data Science , Digital Currency , Digital Economy , Economic and Financial Networks , Financial Economics , Financial Institutions , Financial Markets , Fintech , Forecasting , Game Theory , Macroeconomic Theory , Macroeconomics , Market Microstructure , Money and Banking , Payments Economics , Quantitative Macroeconomics , Risk Management , Technological Change , Time Series
- Skylar Brooks Skylar Brooks is a Senior Economist in the Financial Stability Department. Department(s) : Financial Stability , Central Bank Lending Division Research Field(s) : Digital Currency , Financial Institutions , Financial Markets , International Trade and Finance
- Cyrus Minwalla Cyrus Minwalla is a Security Lead and Researcher in the FinTech Research Department. Department(s) : Information Technology Services , Financial Technology Research Research Field(s) : Data Science , Digital Currency , Retail Payments
- Sriram Darbha Sriram Darbha is a Solutions Architect in the Fintech Research team. He leads the research and analysis into the core technical architecture of retail Central Bank Digital Currency (CBDC) systems. Department(s) : Information Technology Services Research Field(s) : Digital Currency , Fintech
- Christopher Henry Christopher (Chris) is a Senior Economist and serves as lead for the consumer survey research program on the Currency Department’s Economic Research and Analysis team. Department(s) : Currency , Economic Research and Analysis Research Field(s) : Applied Microeconomics , Digital Currency , Fintech , Payments Economics , Retail Payments Alma Mater : McMaster University
- Janet Hua Jiang Janet Jiang is the Research Director of the Research Team in the Banking and Payments Department. Department(s) : Payments and Regulatory Oversight Research Field(s) : Banking , Digital Currency , Digital Economy , Experimental Economics , Financial Markets , Household Finance , Macroeconomic Theory , Monetary Economics , Retail Payments , Two-Sided Markets Alma Mater : Simon Fraser University
- Jonathan Chiu Jonathan Chiu is a Senior Research Advisor in the Banking and Payments Department (BAP). Department(s) : Payments and Regulatory Oversight Research Field(s) : Digital Currency , Monetary Economics , Money and Banking , Payments Economics
